testimonials.q: Finally one place for everything. Before I used WhatsApp, Excel and a bunch of random apps — now everything is in one place and I save an hour a day.
testimonials.name: Mark K.

testimonials.q: I went from 8 to 15 clients without extra stress. The check-in system automatically reminds clients and I immediately see who's late submitting.
testimonials.name: Tom N.

testimonials.q: Clients are thrilled with the mobile app. They have all plans instantly available and can send check-ins directly from the app. Much more professional than before.
testimonials.name: Sara P.

testimonials.q: Administration reduced to a minimum. Plans, payments, communication — all in one. Clients love having their own app, and I have more time for the actual work.

testimonials.q: I know exactly who has paid and when each subscription expires — all on one screen. No more notebooks and forgotten payments. I recommend it to all coaches.

faqs.q: Is a credit card required to register?
faqs.a: Yes, a card is required to activate the trial period, but you are not charged immediately. Try UnitLift free for 14 days — billing only starts after the trial ends if you choose to continue. You can cancel at any time with no penalties or hidden fees.

faqs.q: Do my clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client mobile app is completely free to download and use on iOS and Android devices. The client just downloads the app, you send them access, and they instantly see plans, submit check-ins and chat with you — at no cost to the client.

faqs.q: How long does setup take?
faqs.a: Less than 5 minutes. Registration is fast and intuitive — set up your profile, customize parameters and invite your first client the same day. No long manuals or technical knowledge needed — if you can use a smartphone, you can use UnitLift.

faqs.q: Does UnitLift work on mobile for coaches?
faqs.a: Yes. The web app is fully responsive and you can add it to your phone's home screen as an app. Clients have a dedicated native iOS and Android app optimized for daily use — viewing plans, submitting check-ins and direct chat with their coach.

faqs.q: Can I have my own logo and colors?
faqs.a: Yes, branding is available on Pro and Scale plans. In settings, add your logo, choose primary colors and connect your social media profiles. Clients will then see your brand instead of UnitLift's — looks more professional and builds trust in you as a coach.

faqs.q: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faqs.a: Yes, with no penalties or hidden fees. You can cancel at any time from your account settings — no deadlines and no explanation needed. Access remains active until the end of the paid period.

seoPage.heroH1: Software that replaces WhatsApp and Excel
seoPage.heroSub: UnitLift is a platform for online personal trainers. Training plans, nutrition, weekly check-ins and payment tracking — all on one screen. More clients, without more chaos.
seoPage.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPage.problemH2:
Online coaching without proper software
is chaos that compounds
seoPage.problemSub: Messages on WhatsApp, plans in Excel, payments on paper — it works with 5 clients. At 15, you start losing track of things.

problemCards.title: WhatsApp as a "system"
problemCards.text: Training plans are sent as photos or PDFs. The client can't find an older plan. You don't know if they even saw the new one.

problemCards.title: Excel for client tracking
problemCards.text: A spreadsheet with names, dates and notes. You manually enter every check-in. You lose an hour a week on copy-paste that solves nothing.

problemCards.title: Payments without a system
problemCards.text: Who paid this month? Whose subscription is expiring soon? Without a clear system — you don't know, or you forget to ask. Money stays on the table.

seoPage.featSub: UnitLift centralizes everything a coach needs into one web platform — with a free mobile app for clients included.

features.title: Training and nutrition plans
features.desc: Create personalized plans for each client. They see them instantly in the app — no PDFs, no sending over WhatsApp.

features.title: Weekly check-in system
features.desc: A client fills in a check-in in 2 minutes from their phone. You immediately see progress, measurements and photos — all archived automatically.

features.title: Integrated chat
features.desc: All messages with clients in one place. No more tangled WhatsApp threads and lost messages about workouts.

features.title: Payment tracking
features.desc: See exactly who paid, who's late and how much you earned this month. No manual tracking, no awkward situations.

features.title: Mobile app for clients
features.desc: Clients download the free iOS/Android app and instantly have access to their plans. More professional than any PDF.

seoPage.usecaseH2: Built for online fitness coaches of all kinds

usecases.title: Personal trainer going online
usecases.text: You have 10–20 clients and have been getting by with WhatsApp. You want to look more professional and stop wasting an hour a day on admin. UnitLift is ready in 5 minutes.

usecases.title: Strength coach scaling up
usecases.text: You have 30–50 clients and manual tracking no longer works. You need a system that automatically sends check-in reminders and clearly shows who has paid.

usecases.title: Nutritionist adding coaching
usecases.text: You make nutrition plans and need a system where the client sees their macros, logs progress and communicates with you — without 4 different apps and confused clients.

faqs.q: What is the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a complex platform in English, designed for larger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, available in Croatian, with transparent pricing and no hidden add-ons — and ready to use in 5 minutes.

faqs.q: Do my clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client mobile app is completely free to download and use on iOS and Android. The coach pays the subscription; the client pays nothing to access the platform.

faqs.q: How quickly can I start using UnitLift?
faqs.a: Less than 5 minutes. Registration is fast and intuitive — set up your profile, adjust your parameters and invite your first client the same day. No long manuals, no technical knowledge needed.

faqs.q: Can I try UnitLift without being charged?
faqs.a: Yes. All plans include a 14-day free trial. A card is required for activation, but billing only starts after the trial ends. You can cancel at any time with no penalties.

faqs.q: Does UnitLift work on mobile for coaches?
faqs.a: Yes. The coach web app is fully responsive and can be added to your phone's home screen as an app. Clients have a separate native iOS and Android app optimized for daily use.

seoPageApp.heroH1: The personal trainer app clients actually use
seoPageApp.heroSub: UnitLift gives every client their own mobile app with plans, check-ins and chat. You look more professional — without a single PDF or WhatsApp message.
seoPageApp.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPageApp.problemTag: The problem without a proper app
seoPageApp.problemH2:
Clients without a good app
lose motivation and quit
seoPageApp.problemSub: If a client has to search for their plan in WhatsApp messages or print a PDF, they experience chaos. And chaos leads to quitting — and blaming you.

problemCards.title: Plan buried in chat
problemCards.text: The client has to scroll through weeks of messages to find their plan. Which one is new? Which is old? They keep asking — and you keep explaining.

problemCards.title: PDFs nobody opens
problemCards.text: You send a nicely formatted PDF, the client saves it... and never opens it again. No notifications, no tracking — no feedback.

problemCards.title: Every change = new message
problemCards.text: You change one exercise and have to send a new document. The client doesn't know which version is current. You spend more time sending than coaching.

seoPageApp.featH2:
One app.
The client always has everything.
seoPageApp.featSub: UnitLift gives clients a native iOS and Android app — free. Plans, check-ins, chat and progress on one screen.

features.title: Plans always accessible
features.desc: The client opens the app and immediately sees their current training and nutrition plan. No searching, no questions — everything in one place.

features.title: Check-in in 2 minutes
features.desc: The client submits their weekly check-in directly from their phone. You immediately see measurements, photos and comments — all archived automatically.

features.title: Chat without WhatsApp
features.desc: All messages between you and the client stay in the app. Organised, clear — without mixing with private life.

features.title: Progress tracking
features.desc: The client sees their own progress through charts and comparisons. Motivation grows when results are visible on screen.

features.title: Automatic notifications
features.desc: The system automatically reminds clients about their check-in, new plan or unanswered message. You don't have to send anything manually.

seoPageApp.featVisualStatLbl: Clients submit check-in on time · Platform average: 42%
seoPageApp.usecaseH2: For coaches who care about the impression they make

usecases.title: Coach building a brand
usecases.text: Clients recommend you — partly because your app looks professional. Pro and Scale plans include your own logo and colors in the app.

usecases.title: Coach with 10+ clients
usecases.text: With 10+ clients, manually sending plans becomes a nightmare. UnitLift automates distribution — every client gets their plan instantly.

usecases.title: Coach who wants fewer messages
usecases.text: Clients who have everything in one place send half as many questions. Chat stays for coaching, not for finding plans.

faqs.q: What is the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a complex platform in English, designed for larger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, available in Croatian, with transparent pricing and no hidden add-ons — and ready to use in 5 minutes.

faqs.q: Do clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client mobile app is completely free to download and use on iOS and Android. The coach pays the subscription — clients pay nothing.

faqs.q: Can I have my own logo in the app?
faqs.a: Yes. On Pro and Scale plans you can add your own logo and choose primary colors. Clients then see your brand instead of UnitLift's — looks more professional and builds trust.

faqs.q: What does the client see in the app?
faqs.a: The client sees training and nutrition plans, weekly check-ins, progress history, chat with their coach and their own profile. Everything needed for successful coaching — on one screen.

faqs.q: Does the app work on iPhone and Android?
faqs.a: Yes. The client app is available on the App Store and Google Play. Free download, no credit card registration required for clients.

seoPageCoaching.heroH1: The coaching platform that scales with your business
seoPageCoaching.heroSub: UnitLift is an online coaching platform that replaces a chaotic mix of tools with one system. From your first clients to a full practice — without switching tools.
seoPageCoaching.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPageCoaching.problemH2:
Without the right platform,
your coaching business can't grow
seoPageCoaching.problemSub: Every new client adds more admin than revenue. At some point, admin work outpaces coaching — and that's where many stop.

problemCards.title: Admin eats your revenue
problemCards.text: The average coach with 15 clients spends 8–10 hours per week on admin. That's an entire workday going to Excel, WhatsApp and PDFs — not coaching.

problemCards.title: No system, no growth
problemCards.text: Onboarding a new client takes an hour because you do everything manually. If it took 10 minutes, you could take on twice as many clients.

problemCards.title: Forgotten payments
problemCards.text: Who paid last month? Whose package expires soon? Without a clear overview, you're missing money that's rightfully yours — and feeling awkward asking for it.

seoPageCoaching.featH2:
A system that works
while you coach.
seoPageCoaching.featSub: UnitLift automates all administrative tasks so you can take on more clients without more work.

features.title: Onboarding in 5 minutes
features.desc: Send the client a link — they download the app and immediately see their plan. No long setup, no emails with attachments, no explaining.

features.title: Automatic check-in reminders
features.desc: The system automatically sends weekly reminders to clients. Response rate jumps from 40% to 90%+ — without a single message from you.

features.title: Finances on one screen
features.desc: See immediately who paid, who's late and what your revenue is this month. No manual tracking, no awkward situations.

features.title: Plan template library
features.desc: Create a plan once, copy and customise endlessly. Every new client gets a personalised plan in minutes, not an hour.

features.title: Overview of all clients' progress
features.desc: One view, all clients. See who's progressing, who's late with their check-in and who needs attention — without opening 20 spreadsheet tabs.

seoPageCoaching.usecaseH2: For online coaching businesses of all sizes

usecases.title: From 0 to your first 10 clients
usecases.text: Setup takes 5 minutes. You immediately look more professional than competitors sending PDFs. Clients stay because they have a real system — not WhatsApp.

usecases.title: Scaling from 10 to 50 clients
usecases.text: Every new client shouldn't be a new headache. Onboarding, plans, check-ins and payments run automatically. Growth becomes linear, not exponentially harder.

usecases.title: Coaching agency or trainer team
usecases.text: Scale plan supports up to 150 clients. Multiple trainers, one system, one overview. Finances, progress and communication organised for the whole team.

faqs.q: What is the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a complex platform in English, designed for larger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, available in Croatian, with transparent pricing and no hidden add-ons — and ready to use in 5 minutes.

faqs.q: How long does setup take?
faqs.a: Less than 5 minutes. Set up your profile, add tracking parameters and send your first client a link to download the app. No technical knowledge, no long manuals.

faqs.q: Can UnitLift replace all my current tools?
faqs.a: Yes — for most coaches. UnitLift replaces Excel (client tracking), WhatsApp (communication and plan distribution), Google Sheets (finances) and separate apps for training and nutrition plans.

faqs.q: What if I have more than 150 clients?
faqs.a: The Scale plan supports up to 150 clients. For more, €10/month is added for every additional 25 clients. No hidden fees — pricing grows proportionally with your business.

faqs.q: Does UnitLift work for nutritionist-coaches who offer both nutrition and training?
faqs.a: Yes. UnitLift includes both training and nutrition plans on all plans. The client sees both in one app — no splitting across multiple systems.

seoPageTracking.heroH1: Client tracking software with automatic weekly check-ins
seoPageTracking.heroSub: UnitLift automatically collects weekly data from clients — measurements, photos, mood, sleep. You get a complete overview without a single manually written message.
seoPageTracking.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPageTracking.problemTag: The problem without a tracking system
seoPageTracking.problemH2:
Without tracking you don't know
if your coaching actually works
seoPageTracking.problemSub: You feel like they're progressing, but you don't have the data to prove it. A client quits and you don't know if the problem was the plan, nutrition or insufficient accountability.

problemCards.title: No visibility into progress
problemCards.text: The client says 'it's going well' — but without concrete measurements and photos, those are just impressions. You can't see trends or adjust the plan based on data.

problemCards.title: Check-in is chaos
problemCards.text: The client sends measurements on WhatsApp, photos by email, a comment in another message. You collect everything manually and enter it into a spreadsheet. Every week.

problemCards.title: Clients quit without accountability
problemCards.text: Research shows clients who regularly submit check-ins have 3× greater success. Without a system that tracks them, you're missing the most powerful retention tool.

seoPageTracking.featH2:
Automatic tracking.
Complete picture of every client.
seoPageTracking.featSub: UnitLift collects, organises and displays all client progress data — automatically, weekly, archived.

features.title: Structured weekly check-ins
features.desc: The client fills in a check-in from their phone: body weight, measurements, photos, energy level, sleep, plan adherence. All in one form, in 2 minutes.

features.title: Automatic reminders
features.desc: The system sends a reminder to every client who hasn't submitted their check-in. Submission rate jumps from an average 40% to 90%+ without your intervention.

features.title: Progress graphs over time
features.desc: See the curve of weight, measurements and subjective feeling for each client over weeks and months. Adjust the plan based on real data, not assumptions.

features.title: Progress photo archive
features.desc: All photos are automatically archived chronologically. Compare week 1 and week 12 with one click. Private, secure, always accessible.

features.title: Instant insight without admin
features.desc: As soon as the client submits their check-in, you see it. No copying data, no processing — just coaching based on fresh data.

seoPageTracking.featVisualStatLbl: Check-in submission rate · Without a system: 38%
seoPageTracking.usecaseH2: For coaches who base their coaching on data

usecases.title: Results-driven coach
usecases.text: You adjust every plan based on real data, not assumptions. Check-in data gives you concrete information for every adjustment session.

usecases.title: Coach with high retention
usecases.text: Clients who regularly submit check-ins stay 3× longer. An accountability system is nothing without the infrastructure to support it — UnitLift is that infrastructure.

usecases.title: Coach building a transformation portfolio
usecases.text: The photo archive and graphs automatically create your most powerful marketing asset: proof that coaching works.

faqs.q: What is the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a complex platform in English, designed for larger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, available in Croatian, with transparent pricing and no hidden add-ons — and ready to use in 5 minutes.

faqs.q: What does the client fill in for a check-in?
faqs.a: The client fills in: body weight, optional measurements (waist, hips, bicep etc.), progress photos, energy level (1–10), sleep quality, nutrition and training plan adherence, and a free comment. Every field is optional — you set what's relevant to your coaching approach.

faqs.q: Can I compare progress photos?
faqs.a: Yes. All photos are automatically archived chronologically per client. You can compare any week with any other — front, side and back positions.

faqs.q: Does the system send automatic reminders?
faqs.a: Yes. Every client who hasn't submitted their check-in by a certain day of the week automatically receives a push notification on their phone. Submission rate jumps from an average 40% to 90%+.

faqs.q: Can I track clients who aren't in UnitLift?
faqs.a: UnitLift is designed for clients using the mobile app. For tracking their own progress without a coach's system, a client would need to use one of the generic fitness apps.
